acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, depositions can be AEO-designated if sensitive, but challenge if unsupported.**[1]

NY court scrutinized testimony alongside docs.[1]

- **Same standard**: Sparing use.[1]
- **Tactical flag**: Bulk designations.[1]
- **Motion target**: De-designate portions.

Transcribe, object real-time; post-depo motion.
